heroTitle: Medicinal plants in service of your organisation
heroDesc: Corporate wellness interventions, brand consultancy for wellness businesses, programmes for sports clubs and teams — clinical expertise in herbal medicine and naturopathy at the service of your teams and clients.
s1Desc: Plant medicine wellness workshops, talks on stress and recovery, energy management programmes for teams. Adaptable format according to your needs and sector.
s2Desc: Herbal formulation expertise, product claims validation, wellness range development, sales team training and communication consultancy around botanical ingredients.
s3Desc: Phytotherapy support programmes for clubs and high-level athletes. Adaptogens, inflammation management, hormonal support, recovery between competitions — by a former elite athlete.
s4Desc: Development of plant-based treatment protocols, therapist training, creation of seasonal rituals and communication consultancy around botanical ingredients for premium establishments.
